name: com.invoicexml/invoicexml
title: InvoiceXML
description: Create, validate, convert & extract compliant e-invoices (UBL, Factur-X, ZUGFeRD, XRechnung)

io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.tagline: Global, compliant e-invoicing for AI agents
io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.longDescription: InvoiceXML lets AI agents create, validate, convert, render, and extract compliant electronic invoices across UBL (Peppol BIS Billing 3.0), CII, Factur-X, ZUGFeRD, and XRechnung, all validated against the EN 16931 standard. Hosted with OAuth 2.1, processed statelessly, and never retained.
